fields.label: Display Label
fields.description: What the user sees on the tile. E.g. 'Leave Request'

fields.label: Module Key
fields.description: Unique internal slug — no spaces, use underscores. E.g. leave_request

fields.label: Icon
fields.options:
calendar
check-circle
clipboard
users
briefcase
dollar
clock
file
settings
star
bell
location
chart
box
shield
heart
mail
phone
home
grid
trend-up
task
report
fields.description: Maps to a built-in emoji icon in the PWA

fields.label: Tile Color
fields.description: Background tint color for the tile icon

fields.label: Route Path
fields.description: URL slug — must start with /. E.g. /leave or /attendance

fields.label: Module Type
fields.description: frappe_page = Frappe desk URL in fullscreen iframe | iframe_url = any HTTPS URL | custom_view = built-in Vue component | doc_list = native mobile list/detail for a doctype

fields.label: Target URL
fields.description: frappe_page: /app/leave-application | iframe_url: https://... | custom_view: leave blank | doc_list: the Doctype name, e.g. Sales Order

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Lower number appears first on home screen

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Uncheck to hide from mobile app without deleting
